info.description: WeKnora 知识库管理系统 API 文档
info.title: WeKnora API

post.description: 用户审批通过或驳回一次工具调用（用于 Agent 阻塞等待审批的场景）
post.summary: 处理 MCP 工具调用待审批请求

get.description: 获取当前租户的所有智能体（包括内置智能体）

post.description: 创建新的自定义智能体

delete.description: 删除指定的智能体

get.description: 根据ID获取智能体详情

put.description: 更新智能体的名称、描述和配置

post.description: 复制指定的智能体

delete.description: 从智能体的共享列表中移除指定共享关系

get.description: 基于智能体关联的知识库，返回推荐问题供用户快捷提问

parameters.description: 知识库ID列表（逗号分隔），覆盖智能体默认配置
parameters.name: knowledge_base_ids

parameters.description: 知识ID列表（逗号分隔），限定到具体文档
parameters.name: knowledge_ids

get.description: 获取所有可用的提示词占位符定义，按字段类型分组
返回所有 smart-reasoning 下可用的智能体类型预设（RAG/Wiki/Hybrid/Custom），用于编辑器自动填充系统提示词、工具和 KB 兼容性
get.summary: 获取智能体类型预设列表

get.description: 返回该知识在解析流水线的 trace tree（root → stage → subspan）：每段状态、耗时、input/output、错误码、langfuse_trace_id。支持 ?attempt=N 查看历史尝试；不传则返回最新尝试。前端用于渲染时间线 + 多模态/embedding 子节点 + 一键跳转 Langfuse。
get.summary: 获取知识文档解析的 Span 树（含历史尝试）

post.description: Lite 版专用：首次启动时自动创建默认用户和租户并返回令牌，后续启动直接签发令牌，免除手动注册/登录流程
post.summary: 自动初始化（Lite 桌面版）

post.description: 修改当前用户的登录密码

get.description: 返回当前部署的注册模式等公开认证配置，供前端决定是否展示注册入口

post.description:
根据邀请链接中的 token 返回邀请上下文（租户名 / 角色 / 过期时间），
供注册页展示。无认证；token 无效或被撤销返回 410。
使用 POST + body 而非 GET + path，避免 token 落入访问日志 / 浏览器历史 / tracing。
post.summary: 解析共享邀请链接 token

post.description: 用户登录并获取访问令牌
撤销当前访问令牌并登出

get.description: 获取当前登录用户的详细信息

put.description:
按 PATCH 语义合并用户偏好（仅覆盖请求体里出现的字段，其余字段保持不变），
数据存放在 users.preferences (JSON)，跨设备/浏览器自动同步。
put.summary: 更新当前用户的个性化设置

get.description: 接收OIDC provider回调并由后端完成code交换，随后重定向回前端登录页
返回OIDC是否启用以及provider展示名称，供前端决定是否展示OIDC登录入口
根据后端OIDC配置生成第三方登录跳转地址

post.description: 使用刷新令牌获取新的访问令牌
注册新用户账号

通过 Owner 生成的共享邀请链接 token 完成注册，绕过 invite_only 模式拦截。
注册者自填邮箱（与 token 不绑定）；注册成功后自动加入对应租户。
为当前用户在目标租户重新签发访问令牌；要求该用户在目标租户存在 active 成员关系

get.description: 验证访问令牌是否有效

post.description: 对提交的文本运行自适应分块器并返回分块预览，不写入数据库不生成 embedding。文本最大 64k 字符

parameters.description: 搜索字段: standard_question(标准问题), similar_questions(相似问法), answers(答案), 默认搜索全部

parameters.description: 排序方式: asc(按更新时间正序), 默认按更新时间倒序
parameters.name: sort_order

post.description:
异步批量更新或插入FAQ条目。支持 dry_run 模式（设置 dry_run=true），异步验证不实际导入。
dry_run 模式是异步操作，返回 task_id，通过 /faq/import/progress/{task_id} 查询进度和结果。
验证内容包括：1) 条目基本格式 2) 重复问题（批次内和知识库已有） 3) 内容安全检查。

delete.description:
根据ID异步删除知识条目。请求会被入队到与批量删除相同的异步管道（asynq）；
接口返回 200 仅表示任务已提交（响应 data.task_id 为任务 ID），实际删除由后台 worker 完成。

get.description: 根据ID获取知识条目详情

post.description: 取消进行中的知识解析任务。当前已写入的 chunk / 索引保留，可通过 reparse 接口重新触发解析。已完成 / 已失败 / 删除中的知识不支持取消。

get.description: 下载知识条目关联的原始文件

requestBody.description: 标签更新请求（updates 必填，kb_id 可选）

post.description: Automatically fix fixable wiki issues (broken links, etc.)

get.description:
Returns a slice of the wiki link graph for visualization. Supports
`mode=overview` (top-N most-connected pages, default) and
`mode=ego` (BFS neighborhood of a center slug) to keep response
size tractable for knowledge bases with tens of thousands of pages.

Returns the wiki index as intro text plus per-type paginated
directory groups. The heavy directory markdown that used to
live in wiki_pages.content was replaced with this structured
response so a KB with tens of thousands of pages no longer
materializes megabytes of TEXT on every index open.

parameters.description: Comma-separated page types (default: all content types)
parameters.name: types

parameters.description: Opaque offset cursor from previous response
parameters.name: cursor

get.description: List issues flagged on wiki pages with optional filtering

put.description: Update the status of a flagged wiki page issue

get.description: Perform a comprehensive health check on the wiki

Returns a paginated feed of wiki operation events (ingest, retract, ...)
newest-first. Pagination is cursor-based: pass `next_cursor` from the
previous response back as `cursor` to fetch the next page.

parameters.description: Opaque cursor from the previous page (empty = newest)
parameters.name: cursor

post.description: 在知识库中搜索（不使用LLM总结）

get.description: 返回所有共享给当前用户所在组织的智能体
get.summary: 获取我可访问的共享智能体

get.description: 获取通过组织共享给当前用户的所有知识库
get.summary: 获取共享给我的知识库列表

get.description: 获取所有预装的Agent Skills元数据
返回 system-scope（tenant_id=0）的审计事件，覆盖 system.setting_changed / system.admin_promoted / system.admin_revoked 等 SystemAdmin 操作。按 id 倒序的游标分页。

parameters.description: 游标：返回 id 小于此值的记录（默认从最新开始）
parameters.name: after_id

parameters.description: 按 action 精确过滤（如 system.setting_changed）
parameters.name: action

parameters.description: 按 outcome 精确过滤（success / denied）
parameters.name: outcome

get.description:
Retrieve a paginated list of users with system administrator
privileges (SystemAdmin only). Supports `offset` (default 0)
and `limit` (default 50, max 200) query parameters. Walks the
partial-friendly idx_users_is_system_admin index.

post.description:
Grant system administrator privileges to a user (SystemAdmin only).
Idempotent: re-promoting an existing system admin returns 200 with no DB write.
Identify the user by email (preferred for human operators) or user_id (UUID, for API clients).
post.summary: Promote a user to system administrator

post.description:
Remove system administrator privileges from a user (SystemAdmin only).
Two safety guards: the caller cannot revoke their own privileges,
and revoking the last remaining system admin is rejected — both
prevent a SystemAdmin from accidentally locking the platform out
of system-level administration. Idempotent on already-non-admin users.

400.description: Bad request / would remove last admin / self-revoke

post.summary: Revoke system administrator privileges from a user

get.description:
Return every row in the system_settings table (system-scope,
not tenant-scope). SystemAdmin only.

delete.description:
Removes the DB override for :key so the 3-tier resolver
falls back to the environment variable (when configured)
or the in-code default. Idempotent — resetting a key
that was never persisted returns 200.
delete.summary: Reset a system setting to ENV / built-in default

get.description:
Returns the row matching :key. 404 when the key is unknown
to the registry; 200 with the row when known.

404.description: Key registered but DB row absent

get.summary: Get a single system setting by key

put.description:
Persist a new value for :key. Service validates the
rawValue against the registry's declared value_type and
rejects mismatches with 400. SystemAdmin only. Emits an
audit row (action=system.setting_changed) on success.

400.description: Bad request / unknown key / type mismatch

post.description:
Reads the current value of `tenant.default_storage_quota_gb`
(3-tier resolver: DB > ENV > default) and writes that many
GiB into storage_quota for every row in tenants. Bypasses
the per-tenant PUT whitelist, which forbids storage_quota
edits by Owners. SystemAdmin only.
Idempotent — running twice with the same setting is a no-op.
post.summary: Apply the default storage quota to every existing tenant

get.description: 获取系统版本、构建信息和引擎配置

get.summary: 列出可用的文档解析引擎

requestBody.description: 解析引擎配置（与保存接口同结构）

post.summary: 使用当前参数检测解析引擎可用性

post.description: 使用当前填写的参数测试 MinIO/COS 连通性，不保存配置

get.description: 返回 Local、MinIO、COS 各存储引擎的可用状态及说明，供全局设置与知识库选择使用
获取当前用户可访问的租户列表

post.description:
创建新的租户。任意已登录用户均可调用以建立自己的新工作区，
调用方会被自动设为该租户的 Owner。跨租户超管仍可像以前一样
通过本接口创建任意租户。

delete.description: 删除指定的租户

get.description: 根据ID获取租户详情

put.description: 更新租户信息

post.description: 为指定租户生成一个新的 API Key，旧 Key 立即失效

get.description: 返回该租户最近的审计事件，按 id 倒序。游标分页：将上次响应的 next_cursor 作为下一次请求的 after_id。

parameters.description: 游标：返回 id 小于此值的记录（默认从最新开始）
parameters.name: after_id

parameters.description: 按 action 精确过滤（如 rbac.member_added / rbac.access_denied）
parameters.name: action

parameters.description: 按 outcome 精确过滤（success / denied）
parameters.name: outcome

get.description: 按 tenant 列出待接受 / 历史邀请。query include_terminal=true 时附带 accepted/declined/revoked/expired。

parameters.description: 是否包含终止态行（默认 false）
parameters.name: include_terminal

post.description: Owner 通过邮箱邀请已注册用户加入当前租户；被邀请人需要在 /me/invitations 接受后才会成为成员。

delete.description: Owner 取消一条还在 pending 的邀请；已 accepted/declined/revoked/expired 的行不可再撤销。

post.description:
生成一条多次使用的共享邀请链接：谁拿到链接谁就能注册并加入当前租户。
链接持续有效，直到过期或被撤销。
调用方主动退出当前租户。等价于以自己的 user_id 调 RemoveMember，

get.description: 分页返回当前租户内 active 成员（含每位成员的角色、邮箱、头像）；支持 q 按邮箱/用户名筛选

parameters.description: 按邮箱/用户名模糊筛选
parameters.name: q

post.summary: 直接添加租户成员（直加路径）

delete.description: Owner 将某位成员从当前租户中移除（软删除 tenant_members 行）；不能移除最后一位 Owner

put.description: Owner 修改某位成员在当前租户内的角色；不能将最后一位 Owner 降级

get.description: 获取系统中所有租户（需要跨租户访问权限）
获取租户级别的KV配置（支持web-search-config、prompt-templates、parser-engine-config、storage-engine-config、chat-history-config、retrieval-config）

put.description: 更新租户级别的KV配置（支持web-search-config、parser-engine-config、storage-engine-config、chat-history-config、retrieval-config）

get.description: 获取系统配置的提示词模板列表
获取租户的网络搜索配置
get.summary: 获取租户网络搜索配置

get.description: 分页搜索租户（需要跨租户访问权限）
Lists this user's starred resources in the current tenant for a given type
List all vector stores for the current tenant, including environment-configured and user-created stores

post.description: Create a new vector store configuration for the current tenant

delete.description: Soft-delete a vector store. Env stores cannot be deleted.

get.description: Retrieve a single vector store by ID. Supports both DB stores and env stores (__env_* IDs)

put.description: Update a vector store (name only). Engine type, connection config, and index config are immutable. Env stores cannot be modified.

post.description: Test connectivity of an existing saved or env store. Returns detected server version. For DB stores, the version is automatically saved to connection_config.
post.summary: Test vector store connection by ID

post.description: Test connectivity using provided credentials without persisting. Returns detected server version.
post.summary: Test vector store connection with raw credentials

get.description: Return supported engine types with connection and index field schemas for UI form generation

200.description: List of engine types with config schemas

delete.description: 删除指定 provider 配置

get.description: 根据 ID 获取指定 provider 配置
get.summary: 获取网络搜索 Provider 详情

put.description: 更新指定 provider 的名称/描述/参数/是否默认

post.description: 使用数据库中已保存的凭证测试连通性
使用前端表单中尚未保存的凭证测试连通性，用于"测试连接"按钮
post.summary: 使用原始凭证测试 Provider（不落库）

get.description: 返回 UI 表单需要的 provider 类型及参数定义
get.summary: 获取网络搜索 Provider 类型元数据

get.description: 返回所有已注册的网络搜索 provider（含元数据）
get.summary: 获取可用网络搜索 Provider 列表

post.description: 申请一个用于扫码登录绑定的微信二维码（无请求体）

200.description: 二维码信息（qrcode_url + qrcode 标识）

post.summary: 获取微信扫码登录二维码

post.description: 查询指定二维码是否已被扫描/确认/过期；confirmed 时返回凭证
保存 APPID/APPSECRET 到当前租户配置（不自动创建模型）

ApiKeyAuth.description: 租户身份认证：输入 sk- 开头的 API Key
ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key

Bearer.description: 用户登录认证：输入 Bearer {token} 格式的 JWT 令牌
Bearer.name: Authorization

target_slug.description:
TargetSlug identifies the other page involved in the issue (e.g. the
broken link target, or the entity slug for a missing cross-ref). It is
the structured field used by AutoFix instead of parsing Description.

priority.description: Priority order for UI display (lower = higher priority)

reasoning_content.description:
ReasoningContent stores the OpenAI-protocol reasoning_content emitted by the
model in this round. Persisted on AgentStep so cross-turn replay can put it
back on the assistant message — required by MiMo / DeepSeek V3.2+ thinking
mode, ignored by providers that don't recognize the field.

tool_calls.description: Tools called in this step (Act phase)

embedding_model_id.description:
EmbeddingModelID is the ID of the embedding model used for vectorizing chat messages.
Once messages have been indexed, the model cannot be changed (requires re-indexing).

enabled.description: Enabled controls whether chat history indexing is active

knowledge_base_id.description:
KnowledgeBaseID is the auto-managed hidden knowledge base for chat history.
This is set internally when the feature is first enabled; users should not set this directly.

child_chunk_size.description:
ChildChunkSize is the size of child chunks used for embedding (default: 384).
Only used when EnableParentChild is true.

enable_parent_child.description:
EnableParentChild enables two-level parent-child chunking strategy.
When enabled, large parent chunks provide context while small child chunks
are used for vector matching. Retrieval matches on child but returns parent content.

languages.description:
Languages hints the heuristic patterns. Empty = auto-detect from content.
Examples: ["de"], ["en", "zh"].

parent_chunk_size.description:
ParentChunkSize is the size of parent chunks (default: 4096).
Only used when EnableParentChild is true.

parser_engine_rules.description:
ParserEngineRules configures which parser engine to use for each file type.
When empty, the builtin engine is used for all types.

strategy.description:
Strategy selects the adaptive chunking tier. Empty / "legacy" preserves
the historical recursive splitter; "auto" lets a profiler pick between
heading-aware, heuristic and recursive tiers; "heading" / "heuristic" /
"recursive" pin the tier explicitly.

token_limit.description:
TokenLimit caps chunk size in approximate tokens. 0 = use ChunkSize
as a character count.

database.description:
Database name used by engines that support database-level namespaces
(currently Milvus, Tencent VectorDB, and Doris).

http_port.description:
Doris: HTTP port for Stream Load API (FE default 8030).
Addr is reused for the MySQL protocol "host:9030"; HTTPPort + the host of Addr
together form the FE HTTP endpoint used by Stream Load.

insecure_skip_verify.description:
InsecureSkipVerify disables TLS certificate verification when
talking to the backing store over HTTPS. Defaults to false
(secure). Set to true ONLY for self-signed development clusters;
production deployments should provide trusted certificates via
the system CA pool. Cross-driver applicable but currently only
the OpenSearch driver (Phase 3) reads this field. Note: this
differs from the Qdrant-specific UseTLS below, which *enables*
TLS on gRPC connections — InsecureSkipVerify only controls
*verification* of an already-TLS connection.

version.description:
Version is the detected server version (e.g., "7.10.1", "16.2", "1.12.6").
Auto-populated by TestConnection on successful connectivity check.

max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens allowed in LLM context

recent_message_count.description:
For sliding_window: number of messages to keep
For smart: number of recent messages to keep uncompressed

summarize_threshold.description: Summarize threshold: number of messages before summarization

agent_mode.description:
===== Basic Settings =====
Agent mode: "quick-answer" for RAG mode, "smart-reasoning" for ReAct agent mode

agent_type.description:
AgentType is a preset category under smart-reasoning mode that pre-fills
system prompt, allowed tools and recommended KB compatibility.
Valid values: "rag-qa", "wiki-qa", "hybrid-rag-wiki", "custom".
Empty / unknown values are treated as "custom" (no preset applied).
Ignored for quick-answer mode.

asr_model_id.description: ASR model ID for audio transcription (optional)

audio_upload_enabled.description: Whether audio upload (ASR transcription) is enabled for this agent (default: false)

context_template.description: Context template for normal mode (how to format retrieved chunks)

context_template_id.description:
ContextTemplateID references a template ID in prompt_templates/ YAML files.
If set and ContextTemplate is empty, the template content will be resolved at startup.

data_analysis_enabled.description:
===== Data Analysis Settings =====
Whether to run the legacy in-pipeline DuckDB SQL data-analysis stage when
the retrieved chunks include CSV/Excel files. This issues an extra LLM
call to generate a SQL query and is disabled by default because most
quick-answer / RAG-style agents do not want the added latency.

embedding_top_k.description:
===== Retrieval Strategy Settings (for both modes) =====
Embedding/Vector retrieval top K

enable_query_expansion.description:
===== Advanced Settings (mainly for normal mode) =====
Whether to enable query expansion

enable_rewrite.description: Whether to enable query rewrite for multi-turn conversations

fallback_strategy.description: Fallback strategy: "fixed" for fixed response, "model" for model generation

faq_direct_answer_threshold.description: FAQ direct answer threshold - if similarity > this value, use FAQ answer directly

faq_priority_enabled.description:
===== FAQ Strategy Settings =====
Whether FAQ priority strategy is enabled (FAQ answers prioritized over document chunks)

faq_score_boost.description: FAQ score boost multiplier - FAQ results score multiplied by this factor

history_turns.description: Number of history turns to keep in context

image_storage_provider.description:
Storage provider for image uploads: "local", "minio", "cos", "tos", "s3", "oss", "ks3".
Empty means use the global/tenant default provider.

image_upload_enabled.description:
===== Image Upload / Multimodal Settings =====
Whether image upload is enabled for this agent (default: false)

intent_prompts.description:
IntentPrompts holds per-intent system prompt overrides for non-retrieval
intents (greeting, chitchat, etc.). Empty values fall back to templates
under config/prompt_templates/intent_prompts.yaml.

kb_selection_mode.description:
===== Knowledge Base Settings =====
Knowledge base selection mode: "all" = all KBs, "selected" = specific KBs, "none" = no KB

knowledge_bases.description: Associated knowledge base IDs (only used when KBSelectionMode is "selected")

llm_call_timeout.description: Timeout for a single LLM call in seconds (0 = use global default)

max_completion_tokens.description: Maximum completion tokens (only for normal mode)

max_iterations.description:
===== Agent Mode Settings =====
Maximum iterations for ReAct loop (only for agent type)

mcp_selection_mode.description: MCP service selection mode: "all" = all enabled MCP services, "selected" = specific services, "none" = no MCP

mcp_services.description: Selected MCP service IDs (only used when MCPSelectionMode is "selected")

model_id.description:
===== Model Settings =====
Model ID to use for conversations

multi_turn_enabled.description:
===== Multi-turn Conversation Settings =====
Whether multi-turn conversation is enabled

query_understand_model_id.description:
Dedicated chat model ID for the query-understanding (rewrite + intent) step.
When empty, the main conversation ModelID is used as a fallback.

retain_retrieval_history.description: Whether to retain retrieval history across turns

retrieve_kb_only_when_mentioned.description:
Whether to retrieve knowledge base only when explicitly mentioned with @ (default: false)
When true, knowledge base retrieval only happens if user explicitly mentions KB/files with @
When false, knowledge base retrieval happens according to KBSelectionMode

selected_skills.description: Selected skill names (only used when SkillsSelectionMode is "selected")

skills_selection_mode.description:
===== Skills Settings (only for smart-reasoning mode) =====
Skills selection mode: "all" = all preloaded skills, "selected" = specific skills, "none" = no skills

suggested_prompts.description:
===== Suggested Prompts =====
推荐问题列表，用于在前端对话面板展示快捷提问

supported_file_types.description:
===== File Type Restriction Settings =====
Supported file types for this agent (e.g., ["csv", "xlsx", "xls"])
Empty means all file types are supported
When set, only files with matching extensions can be used with this agent

system_prompt.description: System prompt for the agent (unified prompt, uses web_search_status placeholder for dynamic behavior)

system_prompt_id.description:
SystemPromptID references a template ID in prompt_templates/ YAML files.
If set and SystemPrompt is empty, the template content will be resolved at startup.

thinking.description: Whether to enable thinking mode (for models that support extended thinking)

vlm_model_id.description: VLM model ID for image analysis (optional, falls back to tenant-level VLM)

web_fetch_enabled.description: Whether to auto-fetch full page content for reranked web search results

web_fetch_top_n.description: Max number of pages to fetch after rerank (default: 3)

web_search_enabled.description:
===== Web Search Settings =====
Whether web search is enabled

web_search_provider_id.description:
WebSearchProviderID references a specific WebSearchProviderEntity.
If empty, the tenant's default provider (is_default=true) is used.

config.description:
Encrypted configuration (API credentials, tokens, etc.)
Stored as JSON with AES-256-GCM encryption

conflict_strategy.description: Conflict resolution strategy: overwrite or skip

last_sync_cursor.description: Cursor or state for incremental sync (connector-specific)

latest_sync_log.description: Latest sync log (not stored in DB, populated on query)

sync_deletions.description: Whether to sync deletions from source

sync_log_retention_days.description: Number of days to keep sync logs (default: 30)

sync_schedule.description: Cron expression for scheduled syncs (e.g., "0 */6 * * *" = every 6 hours)

total_items_synced.description: Total items synced (not stored in DB, calculated on query)

task_id.description: 可选，如果不传则自动生成UUID

by_id.description: ByID 按条目ID更新，key为条目ID (seq_id)

exclude_ids.description: ExcludeIDs 在ByTag操作中需要排除的ID列表 (seq_id)

id.description: ID 可选，用于数据迁移时指定 seq_id（必须小于自增起始值 100000000）

first_priority_tag_ids.description: 第一优先级标签ID列表，限定命中范围，优先级最高

only_recommended.description: 是否仅返回推荐的条目

second_priority_tag_ids.description: 第二优先级标签ID列表，限定命中范围，优先级低于第一优先级

buckets_num.description: Doris: number of buckets per table (DISTRIBUTED BY HASH ... BUCKETS N)

desired_shard_count.description: Weaviate: number of shards per collection

hnsw_ef_construction.description: OpenSearch: HNSW index-build candidate list size

hnsw_ef_search.description: OpenSearch: HNSW search candidate list size (faiss; lucene reads at query time)

hnsw_m.description:
--- OpenSearch k-NN HNSW fields ---
All omitempty so other engines' serialized IndexConfig is unchanged.
Zero / empty values fall back to the driver defaults in buildInternalCfg.

shards_num.description: Milvus: number of shards per collection (CreateCollection)

graph_enabled.description: GraphEnabled enables knowledge graph entity/relation extraction

vector_enabled.description: VectorEnabled enables semantic vector embedding and search

wiki_enabled.description: WikiEnabled enables automatic wiki page generation from documents

representative_user_id.description:
RepresentativeUserID identifies the user attached to the OTM row for
display/audit. Optional: when unset, the handler picks a stable default
(the user from the legacy UserID field, or the tenant's owner).

tenant_id.description: TenantID is the tenant to enrol as an org member. Preferred field.

user_id.description:
UserID is retained for backward compatibility. When set without
TenantID, the handler resolves the user's TenantID and uses this
user as the representative.

channel.description: Channel indicates through which channel the knowledge was ingested (web, api, browser_extension, wechat, etc.)

knowledge_base_name.description: Knowledge base name (not stored in database, populated on query)

last_faq_import_result.description: Last FAQ import result (for FAQ type knowledge only)

pending_subtasks_count.description:
PendingSubtasksCount is the outstanding enrichment subtask count
(summary + question + graph chunks). Only meaningful while
ParseStatus == "finalizing"; defaults to 0 in any terminal state.

source.description: Source of the knowledge (e.g. URL address for url type, "manual" for manual type)

summary_status.description: Summary status for async summary generation

tag_id.description: Optional tag ID for categorization within a knowledge base

updated_at.description: Last updated time of the knowledge

chunk_count.description: Chunk count (not stored in database, calculated on query)

created_at.description: Creation time of the knowledge base

creator_id.description:
CreatorID records the user ID of whoever originally created the KB.
Used by the tenant-level RBAC middleware to let Contributors edit
their own KBs without granting them access to everyone else's.
Nullable for backward compatibility with rows created before the
RBAC migration backfilled the column to the tenant Owner.

creator_name.description:
CreatorName 是 CreatorID 对应用户的展示名（username / email 等），
仅在列表场景由 handler 批量回填，不落库；为空表示创建者无法解析（用户已删除、
CreatorID 为空的老数据等）。前端用它在卡片来源徽章上做 mine vs tenant 的二分。

deleted_at.description: Deletion time of the knowledge base

faq_config.description: FAQConfig stores FAQ specific configuration such as indexing strategy

id.description: Unique identifier of the knowledge base

indexing_strategy.description:
IndexingStrategy controls which indexing pipelines are active for this knowledge base.
Pipelines: vector search, keyword search, wiki generation, knowledge graph extraction.

is_pinned.description:
IsPinned and PinnedAt are computed per-caller from user_kb_pins
(see migration 000050). They used to be stored on the row itself,
which made pinning a tenant-wide ordering decision gated behind
the kb-edit RBAC guard. The columns are still present in legacy
schemas for rollback safety but are no longer read or written by
the application — both fields are tagged `gorm:"-"` so GORM
ignores them on every CRUD call and the list handler stamps them
after enriching with the caller's pin set.

is_processing.description: IsProcessing indicates if there is a processing import task (for FAQ type knowledge bases)

is_temporary.description: Whether this knowledge base is temporary (ephemeral) and should be hidden from UI

knowledge_count.description: Knowledge count (not stored in database, calculated on query)

pinned_at.description:
PinnedAt records when the current caller pinned this knowledge
base; nil when they have not.

processing_count.description: ProcessingCount indicates the number of knowledge items being processed (for document type knowledge bases)

question_generation_config.description: QuestionGenerationConfig stores question generation configuration for document knowledge bases

share_count.description: ShareCount indicates the number of organizations this knowledge base is shared with (not stored in database)

storage_config.description: Deprecated: legacy COS config column. Kept for backward compatibility with old data.

storage_provider_config.description: Storage provider config (new): only stores provider selection; credentials from tenant StorageEngineConfig

type.description: Type of the knowledge base (document, faq, etc.)

updated_at.description: Last updated time of the knowledge base

vector_store_id.description:
VectorStoreID references the VectorStore this knowledge base is bound to.
When nil, the KB falls back to the tenant's effective engines derived from
the RETRIEVE_DRIVER environment variable (env store flow).
This field is set once at creation time and must not be modified afterwards;
enforcement lives at the GORM layer (`<-:create`) plus the service-layer
KB update path, which omits this field from its update DTO.

wiki_config.description: WikiConfig stores wiki-specific configuration (only for wiki type knowledge bases)

faq_config.description: FAQ configuration (only for FAQ type knowledge bases)

indexing_strategy.description:
IndexingStrategy controls which indexing pipelines are active.
nil means "no change" when updating (preserves existing strategy).

wiki_config.description: Wiki configuration (only for wiki-enabled knowledge bases)

my_permission.description: Effective permission for current user = min(Permission, MyRoleInOrg)

my_role_in_org.description: Current user's role in this organization (admin/editor/viewer)

permission.description: Share permission (what the space was granted: viewer/editor)

resource_counts.description: 各空间内知识库/智能体数量，供列表侧栏展示

memberships.description:
Memberships lists every tenant the user can authenticate into,
along with their role in each. Always populated (length 1 for users
who only belong to their home tenant) so frontends can render a
tenant switcher without a follow-up request. Serialised without
omitempty so the field is always present as a JSON array (possibly
empty) — the "always populated" contract relies on the server side
guaranteeing a non-nil slice.

retry_delay.description: Delay between retries in seconds, default: 1

is_builtin.description: Whether this is a builtin MCP service (visible to all tenants)

agent_duration_ms.description: Agent total execution duration in milliseconds (from query start to answer start)

agent_steps.description:
Agent execution steps (only for assistant messages generated by agent)
This contains the detailed reasoning process and tool calls made by the agent
Stored for user history display, but NOT included in LLM context to avoid redundancy

attachments.description: Attached files (documents, audio, etc., for user messages)

channel.description: Channel indicates the source channel of this message (e.g., "web", "api", "im")

images.description: Attached images with OCR/Caption text (for user messages)

is_fallback.description: Whether this response is a fallback (no knowledge base match found)

knowledge_id.description:
KnowledgeID links this message to a Knowledge entry in the chat history knowledge base
Used for vector search indexing: when set, the message content has been indexed as a Knowledge passage

knowledge_references.description: References to knowledge chunks used in the response

mentioned_items.description:
Mentioned knowledge bases and files (for user messages)
Stores the @mentioned items when user sends a message

request_id.description: Request identifier for tracking API requests

session_id.description: ID of the session this message belongs to

content.description: Extracted text content (for small text files)

app_secret.description: AES-256 加密存储，实际承载上游 API Key

custom_headers.description:
CustomHeaders 允许在调用远程模型 API 时附加自定义 HTTP 请求头，
用途类似 Python OpenAI SDK 的 extra_headers 参数，
常见场景包括透传企业网关鉴权信息、追踪 ID、路由标识等。
保留字段（Authorization、api-key、Content-Type、Accept 等）会在运行期被忽略以避免破坏签名/鉴权流程。

provider.description: Provider identifier: openai, aliyun, zhipu, generic

supports_vision.description: Whether the model accepts image/multimodal input

agent_share_count.description: 共享到该组织的智能体数量

has_pending_upgrade.description: 当前用户是否有待处理的权限升级申请

owner_tenant_id.description:
OwnerTenantID is the persisted owner tenant of the organization
(Plan 3, migration 000046). Frontend uses this to identify the
"owner row" in the tenant-keyed members list — comparing
member.tenant_id against owner_tenant_id is the post-Plan-3
equivalent of the old member.user_id == owner_id check.

pending_join_request_count.description: 待审批加入申请数（仅管理员可见）

share_count.description: 共享到该组织的知识库数量

mineru_cloud_model.description: MinerU 云 API 解析参数

odl_hybrid.description: OpenDataLoader PDF (docreader engine); hybrid requires opendataloader-pdf-hybrid service.

question_count.description: Number of questions to generate per chunk (default: 3, max: 10)

requested_role.description: The role user wants to upgrade to

external_id.description: Unique identifier in the external system

has_children.description: Whether this resource has children that can be expanded

modified_at.description: Last modified time in external system

parent_id.description: For hierarchical resources (parent ID if applicable)

type.description: Resource type (document, folder, space, page, etc.)

url.description: URL to access in external system

embedding_top_k.description: EmbeddingTopK is the maximum number of chunks returned by vector search (default: 50)

keyword_threshold.description: KeywordThreshold is the minimum keyword match score (0-1, default: 0.3)

rerank_model_id.description: RerankModelID is the ID of the rerank model to use (required for search)

rerank_threshold.description: RerankThreshold is the minimum rerank score (-10 to 10, default: 0.2)

rerank_top_k.description: RerankTopK is the maximum number of results after reranking (default: 10)

rrf_k.description:
RRFK is the smoothing constant of Reciprocal Rank Fusion. Larger values
flatten the curve, reducing the bias towards top-1 results.
Default: 60. Sensible range: 30..100 depending on corpus size.

rrf_keyword_weight.description: RRFKeywordWeight is the keyword counterpart. Default: 0.3.

rrf_vector_weight.description:
RRFVectorWeight is the weight applied to the vector retriever inside RRF.
RRFVectorWeight + RRFKeywordWeight should usually sum to 1.0 but the math
works for any positive weights. Default: 0.7.

vector_threshold.description: VectorThreshold is the minimum vector similarity score (0-1, default: 0.15)

role.description: Optional: role to assign when approving; overrides applicant's requested role

knowledge_base_ids.description:
KnowledgeBaseIDs overrides the single KB ID passed to HybridSearch,
allowing a single retrieval call to span multiple KBs that share the
same embedding model. When empty, HybridSearch uses its own id parameter.

skip_context_enrichment.description:
SkipContextEnrichment skips fetching parent, nearby, and relation chunks
in processSearchResults. Used by the chat pipeline where context assembly
is handled separately in the merge stage.

tag_ids.description: Tag IDs for filtering (used for FAQ priority filtering)

chunk_metadata.description: ChunkMetadata stores chunk-level metadata (e.g., generated questions)

knowledge_base_id.description: KnowledgeBaseID is the ID of the knowledge base this result belongs to

knowledge_channel.description: KnowledgeChannel indicates through which channel the knowledge was ingested (web, api, wechat, etc.)

knowledge_description.description: KnowledgeDescription is the description of the knowledge document

knowledge_filename.description:
Knowledge file name
Used for file type knowledge, contains the original file name

knowledge_source.description:
Knowledge source
Used to indicate the source of the knowledge, such as "url"

matched_content.description:
MatchedContent is the actual content that was matched in vector search
For FAQ: this is the matched question text (standard or similar question)

is_pinned.description: IsPinned indicates whether the session is pinned in the list.

last_request_state.description:
LastRequestState records the input-bar state used the last time this
session sent a question (agent, model, KB scope, web search, MCPs).
Persisted on every successful POST to /knowledge-chat or /agent-chat so
that reopening the session can restore the original request context to
the chat UI. Stored in the legacy sessions.agent_config JSONB column to
avoid a new migration; the shape used today is `SessionLastRequestState`.

pinned_at.description: PinnedAt records when the session was pinned; nil when not pinned.

user_id.description:
UserID is the owner of the session. Empty for legacy rows (visible at
tenant level) and for IM-created sessions that do not map to a WeKnora user.

force_path_style.description: ForcePathStyle (S3 specific) - whether to use path-style URLs

secret_id.description: Secret ID (COS) / Access Key ID (S3, MinIO)

secret_key.description: Secret Key (COS) / Secret Access Key (S3, MinIO)

use_ssl.description: UseSSL (S3 specific) - whether to use HTTPS

role.description: Optional: role the applicant requests (admin/editor/viewer); default viewer

items_created.description: New items created in knowledge base

status.description: Sync status: running, success, partial, failed, canceled

category.description:
Category groups settings in the management UI ("limits", "agent",
"auth", ...). Free-form string so adding a new category is a
data-only change.

enum.description:
Enum is populated by the service layer (NOT persisted) from the
in-code registry. Empty/nil means "free-form input"; non-empty
means the UI should render a select with these options. Tagged
`gorm:"-"` so GORM never tries to read/write the column.

is_secret.description:
IsSecret reserves UI affordances for P3 (mask + reveal-with-confirm).
In P1 every row is is_secret=false; service Update accepts the
column but does not yet enforce special handling.

last_modified_by_name.description:
LastModifiedByName is a display label resolved from LastModifiedBy
(the user's UUID) at handler time — username when available,
otherwise email. Empty for virtual rows that were never persisted
(LastModifiedBy=""). Not stored: derived per request so renaming
a user reflects on the next reload without a backfill job.

requires_restart.description:
RequiresRestart reserves UI affordances for P3 (banner "this
change won't take effect until the next restart"). In P1 the
only seeded key is per-request, so always false.

value_type.description:
ValueType is one of "int", "string", "bool". Service layer rejects
updates whose payload type does not match; UI uses it to pick
InputNumber vs Input vs Switch.

chat_history_config.description: Chat history config: knowledge base configuration for indexing and searching chat messages via vector search

context_config.description: Global Context configuration for this tenant (default for all sessions)

credentials.description: Credentials config: third-party provider credentials (e.g. WeKnoraCloud AppID/AppSecret)

parser_engine_config.description: Parser engine config overrides (MinerU endpoint, API key, etc.). Used when parsing documents; overrides env.

retrieval_config.description: Retrieval config: global search/retrieval parameters shared by knowledge search and message search

storage_engine_config.description: Storage engine config: parameters for Local, MinIO, COS. Used for document/file storage and docreader.

storage_quota.description: Storage quota (Bytes), default is 10GB, including vector, original file, text, index, etc.

web_search_config.description: Global WebSearch configuration for this tenant

reflection.description: Agent's reflection on this tool call result (if enabled)

images.description: Base64 data URIs from tool (e.g. MCP image content)

searchable.description: open for search so others can discover and join

can_access_all_tenants.description: Whether the user can access all tenants (cross-tenant access)

is_system_admin.description: Whether the user is a system administrator (independent of tenant roles)

preferences.description:
Per-user UI/feature preferences (memory toggle, future knobs).
Stored as JSON (jsonb on Postgres, TEXT on SQLite) via the
driver.Valuer / sql.Scanner methods on UserPreferences.

tenant.description: Association relationship, not stored in the database

tenant_id.description: Tenant ID that the user belongs to

updated_at.description: Last updated time of the user

enable_memory.description:
EnableMemory mirrors the "开启记忆功能" switch in General Settings.
nil  = preference never set (treat as feature default = false)
*false / *true = user explicitly set the toggle.

last_active_tenant_id.description:
LastActiveTenantID remembers the last tenant the user actively
switched into, so a fresh login (new device, cleared browser, new
refresh token) lands them back in that workspace instead of always
bouncing to their home tenant. Login / RefreshToken validate that
the tenant still exists and the user still has an active membership
(or CanAccessAllTenants) before honouring this preference; an
invalid pointer is best-effort cleared and the user falls back to
home.

nil  = no preference (use user.TenantID, i.e. home)
*0   = "clear preference" sentinel for the partial-update endpoint
       (UpdateUserPreferences turns this into nil). Otherwise treat
       a stored *0 the same as nil.
*N   = preferred tenant id.

compression_method.description: 压缩方法：none, summary, extract, rag

document_fragments.description: 文档片段数量（用于RAG压缩）

proxy_url.description: Optional per-request proxy override; normally empty — use WebSearchProviderEntity.Parameters.proxy_url. Merged at call time when set.

is_default.description: Whether this is the default provider for the tenant

parameters.description: Provider-specific parameters (API key, engine ID, etc.) stored as encrypted JSON

provider.description: Provider type: bing, google, duckduckgo, tavily

api_key.description: API key for the search provider (encrypted in DB)

base_url.description:
Base URL for self-hosted search engines (e.g. SearXNG instance URL).
Validated with utils.ValidateURLForSSRF; private hosts must be added to SSRF_WHITELIST.

engine_id.description: Google Custom Search Engine ID (only for Google provider)

extra_config.description: Provider-specific extra configuration for future extensibility

proxy_url.description:
Optional HTTP/HTTPS proxy URL for outbound search requests (e.g. http://host:port); validated with utils.ValidateURLForSSRF.
Does not replace the search API endpoint; only tunnels traffic to the official APIs.

extraction_granularity.description:
ExtractionGranularity controls how many candidate slugs Pass 0 extracts
per document. Empty / unknown value is treated as WikiExtractionStandard.

ingest_batch_size.description:
IngestBatchSize controls how many pending ops a single batch
processes before scheduling a follow-up. 0 falls back to the
hard-coded default (5). Operators on large KBs (4w+ docs) can
raise this to 10–20 to amortize the lock-acquire / index-rebuild
overhead across more documents per round.

ingest_map_parallel.description:
IngestMapParallel sets the errgroup limit for the Map phase
(per-document extraction + summary + chunk citation). 0 falls
back to 10. Bound by the LLM provider's concurrency limit and
the worker's outbound HTTP pool.

ingest_reduce_parallel.description:
IngestReduceParallel sets the errgroup limit for the Reduce phase
(per-slug page write). 0 falls back to 10. Bound by the same
LLM concurrency / HTTP pool considerations as the Map phase,
plus DB connection pool size.

max_pages_per_ingest.description: MaxPagesPerIngest limits pages created/updated per ingest operation (0 = no limit)

synthesis_model_id.description: SynthesisModelID is the LLM model ID used for wiki page generation and updates

total.description: total node count in the KB before filtering/limit

action.description:
Short operation tag: "ingest", "retract", etc. Matches the `action`
argument historically passed to appendLogEntry.

doc_title.description:
Document title at the time of the event. Stored verbatim rather than
joined at read time so deleted knowledge still has a human-readable
label in the log.

id.description:
Auto-increment identifier. Monotonic within a single database, so
frontend pagination uses it as a stable cursor without needing to
disambiguate identical created_at values.

knowledge_base_id.description: Knowledge base this event belongs to.

knowledge_id.description: Knowledge ID the event was about (may be empty for KB-level events).

pages_affected.description:
Wiki pages affected by this event. Each ref carries both slug (for
navigation) and title (for display) so the log renders human-
readable text without a post-hoc slug→title lookup that might fail
for now-deleted pages.

summary.description: One-line summary of the change, as it was when the event was logged.

tenant_id.description: Tenant scope, mirrored from the enclosing knowledge base.

aliases.description: Alternate names, abbreviations, acronyms or translated names

chunk_refs.description:
ChunkRefs records the specific source-document chunks this page was
built from — one UUID per cited chunk. Populated during ingest from
the chunk-citation pass; refreshed wholesale whenever the page is
re-materialized. Empty for summary pages (they are document-level
synopses and don't carry chunk-level citations). Use this when you
need to surface the underlying evidence for a wiki page, or to
retract citations when a source document is deleted.

in_links.description: Slugs of pages that link TO this page (backlinks)

knowledge_base_id.description: Knowledge base this page belongs to

out_links.description: Slugs of pages this page links to (outbound links)

page_type.description: Page type: summary, entity, concept, index, log, synthesis, comparison

slug.description:
URL-friendly slug for addressing, e.g. "entity/acme-corp", "concept/rag"
Unique within a knowledge base

source_refs.description:
References to source knowledge IDs that contributed to this page.
Format matches the legacy "<knowledge_id>|<doc_title>" convention used
across the ingest pipeline, so retract / display code can split on `|`
to recover the title. Document-level granularity.

version.description:
Version number. Incremented only when a user-visible content field
(title, content, summary, page_type, status) actually changes; pure
bookkeeping writes (link maintenance, same-content re-ingest, status
sync from background jobs) leave it untouched so it can be used as a
real "the page was edited" signal.

is_active.description: whether wiki ingestion is currently running

pending_tasks.description: number of documents waiting to be ingested

valid.description: Valid is true if Time is not NULL

exclude_ids.description: Chunk seq_ids to exclude from deletion

chat_id.description: ID of chat model to use

knowledge_base_id.description: ID of knowledge base to use

rerank_id.description: ID of rerank model to use

db_migration_error.description:
DBMigrationError carries the human-readable error message recorded when
the most recent startup migration attempt failed. Empty when migrations
succeeded; non-empty values let the frontend surface a troubleshooting
banner instead of silently hiding the DB version row (see issue #1319).

started_at.description: StartedAt is the server process boot time (RFC3339, UTC).

uptime_seconds.description: UptimeSeconds is seconds elapsed since process start.

strategy.description:
Strategy / TokenLimit / Languages use pointer types so the
handler can distinguish "field absent in payload" (no change)
from "field present with empty/zero value" (clear / disable).
Without that distinction, users could set strategy="auto" once
but never reset it back to legacy / unset.

embeddingModelId.description: optional when RAG indexing is disabled

multimodal.description: 多模态配置（仅模型相关；存储引擎在 storageProvider 中配置）

storageProvider.description: 存储引擎选择（"local" | "minio" | "cos"），影响文档上传与文档内图片存储，参数从全局设置读取

appSecret.description: AppSecret 用于 LKEAP Rerank 等需要第二段密钥的场景（对应模型 Parameters.AppSecret）。

modelId.description:
ModelID, when set, instructs the handler to substitute any missing
secrets (APIKey, AppSecret via ExtraConfig) from the stored model
record before assembling the test client. This lets the "Test
connection" button work on existing models without making the
frontend reload — and ship — the plaintext API key. Other fields
(BaseURL, ModelName, etc.) on this request still override the
stored values, so a user can validate a new endpoint against the
existing credentials in one click.

truncated_to.description:
TruncatedTo, when set, is the original chunk count before the
response was truncated to previewMaxChunks for transport.

appSecret.description: AppSecret 用于 LKEAP Rerank 等需要第二段密钥的场景（对应模型 Parameters.AppSecret）。

modelId.description:
ModelID, when set, instructs the handler to substitute any missing
secrets (APIKey, AppSecret via ExtraConfig) from the stored model
record before assembling the test client. This lets the "Test
connection" button work on existing models without making the
frontend reload — and ship — the plaintext API key. Other fields
(BaseURL, ModelName, etc.) on this request still override the
stored values, so a user can validate a new endpoint against the
existing credentials in one click.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20)

available.description: whether the engine can be used

value.description:
Value is intentionally `any` (decoded as float64 / string / bool /
etc. by the JSON unmarshaller). Service.encodeForType normalises
these against the registry's declared type and rejects mismatches.

last_active_tenant_id.description:
LastActiveTenantID lets the SPA persist "after a fresh login,
drop me back into this workspace" across devices. Send a positive
tenant id to set / replace, or 0 to clear. Membership is validated
at next login, not here. Nil = field omitted from the PATCH and
stays untouched.

agent_enabled.description: Whether agent mode is enabled for this request

agent_id.description: Selected custom agent ID (backend resolves shared agent and its tenant from share relation)

disable_title.description: Whether to disable auto title generation

enable_memory.description:
EnableMemory is the per-request override for the memory feature.
Pointer + omitempty so the request can distinguish three states:
  nil   = client did not specify; backend falls back to the calling
          user's persisted preference (user.preferences.enable_memory),
          defaulting to false if that's also unset. This is the path
          used by the normal logged-in chat UI now that the toggle is
          stored server-side per user.
  *true / *false = explicit override. Embedded mode forces *false so a
          user's personal memory setting doesn't leak into a widget
          context; older clients that still send a literal bool also
          land here (back-compat).

knowledge_base_ids.description: Selected knowledge base ID for this request

knowledge_ids.description: Selected knowledge ID for this request

query.description: Query text for knowledge base search

summary_model_id.description: Optional summary model ID for this request (overrides session default)

web_search_enabled.description: Whether web search is enabled for this request

messages.description: Messages to use as context for title generation

url.description: serving URL after saving to storage

knowledge_base_id.description: Single knowledge base ID (for backward compatibility)

knowledge_base_ids.description: IDs of knowledge bases to search (multi-KB support)

knowledge_ids.description: IDs of specific knowledge (files) to search
